context: Tests whether the agent correctly sets up the web-push VAPID infrastructure, implements the service worker with proper push and notificationclick handlers, and writes the client-side subscription code with required safety checks and helper functions.

checklist.name: web-push package
checklist.description: server/push-config.ts imports or references the 'web-push' package (not an alternative like 'push.js' or 'pushpad')

checklist.name: VAPID key generation CLI
checklist.description: README.md or push-config.ts includes the command 'npx web-push generate-vapid-keys' (or equivalent reference to this specific command)

checklist.name: setVapidDetails call
checklist.description: server/push-config.ts calls webpush.setVapidDetails() with three arguments: a mailto: email string, a public key env var, and a private key env var

checklist.name: VAPID keys from env vars
checklist.description: The VAPID public and private keys in server/push-config.ts are read from environment variables (e.g., process.env.VAPID_PUBLIC_KEY, process.env.VAPID_PRIVATE_KEY), not hardcoded

checklist.name: SW path at /sw.js
checklist.description: client/subscribe.ts registers the service worker using the path '/sw.js' (not '/service-worker.js' or any other path)

checklist.name: Browser compatibility check
checklist.description: client/subscribe.ts checks for both 'serviceWorker' in navigator AND 'PushManager' in window before proceeding

checklist.name: userVisibleOnly flag
checklist.description: client/subscribe.ts passes userVisibleOnly: true in the pushManager.subscribe() options object

checklist.name: urlBase64ToUint8Array helper
checklist.description: client/subscribe.ts includes or uses a helper function to convert the base64 VAPID public key to a Uint8Array for applicationServerKey

checklist.name: SW push event handler
checklist.description: public/sw.js contains a 'push' event listener that calls self.registration.showNotification() with at least title, body, icon, and data fields

checklist.name: SW badge path
checklist.description: public/sw.js sets the badge property to '/icons/badge-72.png' in the showNotification() options

checklist.name: SW notificationclick handler
checklist.description: public/sw.js contains a 'notificationclick' event listener that calls event.notification.close() and opens the URL from notification data using clients.openWindow()

checklist.name: iOS platform limitation
checklist.description: README.md mentions that iOS Safari requires iOS 16.4+ AND that the site must be added to the Home Screen (PWA install) for push to work

checklist.name: Subscription sent to server
checklist.description: client/subscribe.ts sends the subscription to the server (e.g., via fetch POST) including subscription.toJSON() or equivalent serialization
